name: Golden Hour Latte
description: Double shot espresso, oat milk, and a hint of turmeric sunshine. A warm, glowing start to your day.

name: Rosemary Bloom Cold Brew
description: Sparkling cold brew infused with fresh rosemary and peach bitters. Refreshing and sophisticated.

name: Lumina Flat White
description: Micro-foamed milk folded into our house-blend medium roast. Smooth and velvety.

name: Minty Matcha Cloud
description: Ceremonial matcha topped with a light mint-infused cold foam. A vibrant, airy escape.

name: House Espresso
description: Rich, bold single-origin espresso shot with caramel crema

name: Spiced Chai
description: Spiced black tea concentrate with steamed milk and a hint of vanilla

name: Almond Croissant
description: Flaky, golden-baked croissant filled with sweet almond cream

name: Lumina Avocado Toast
description: Sourdough with smashed avocado, heirloom tomatoes, and micro-greens

name: Matcha Tiramisu
description: Layers of matcha-soaked ladyfingers with mascarpone cream and ceremonial matcha powder
